message:
fix(cli): improve reopen/update commands and test robustness

CLI commands:
- Enhance reopen.rs command handling
- Improve update.rs command logic
- Simplify sync/mod.rs implementation

Tests:
- Expand baseline test coverage in tests/common/baseline.rs
- Update mod.rs test utilities
- Improve conformance_text_output.rs assertions
